subject: Jesus Molina-Veya
summary: 45-year-old man with prior suicide attempt died by suicide at overcrowded Stewart Detention Center. Third suicide at facility. Screening failed to flag high-risk despite documented mental health history. CoreCivic-operated facility has pattern of inadequate mental health care.

victim_details.name: Jesus Molina-Veya
victim_details.medical_condition: Mental health issues, prior suicide attempt, substance abuse history
